title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Bonney, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Marines, York as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Red Port -- The Base of the Red Line

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I heard he fled the holy land....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's meant to be the celestial dragons' invincible slave...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Section off the North East District....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's a former warlord of the sea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Just appeared by the Bondola gate!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Deploy all available marines to his location!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's a man with no shred of humanity...

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: He may serve the celestial dragons...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But his current purpose and programming are unknown!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Egghead, the island of the future - New World

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 34 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
